title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-05
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the plants and updating the daily app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and Greenhouse listings.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and Greenhouse metrics accurate and up to date.
gist.visual_concept: The robot monitor and Polly the bee checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with metrics while Polly waters some pixelated code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the cute bee mascot who is watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
